sections.paragraph:
Τέρτυλλος, ου, ὁ (CIG 3001; 4337; IG VII, 4173; XIV, 826, 44; CIL III, 14, 428; 14, 447. On the spelling s. WDittenberger, Her 6, 1872, 293f; B-D-F §41, 1) Tertullus, attorney for those who accused Paul before Felix the procurator Ac 24:1f.—SLösch, D. Dankesrede des T.: TQ 112, ’31, 295–319.—Kl. Pauly V 615; BHHW III 1953. M-M.

CIG CIG = Corpus Inscriptionum Graecarum—List 3

IG IG = Inscriptiones Graecae—List 3

CIL CIL = Corpus Inscriptionum Latinarum—List 3

Her Her = Hermes, Zeitschrift für klassische Philologie—List 6

B-D-F B-D-F = FBlass, ADebrunner, RFunk, A Greek Grammar of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature—List 6

TQ TQ = Theologische Quartalschrift—List 6

Kl. Pauly Kl. Pauly = Der Kleine Pauly: Lexikon der Antike—List 6

BHHW BHHW = Biblisch-historisches Handwörterbuch—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1000
